scripts.build:go: if [ -d cli-go ]; then cd cli-go && go build -o dist/spm .; fi
scripts.lint:go: if [ -d cli-go ]; then cd cli-go && golangci-lint run ./...; fi
scripts.format:go: if [ -d cli-go ]; then cd cli-go && gofmt -w .; fi
scripts.format:check:go: if [ -d cli-go ]; then cd cli-go && test -z "$(gofmt -l .)" || { echo 'Go files need formatting:'; gofmt -l .; exit 1; }; fi
scripts.vet:go: if [ -d cli-go ]; then cd cli-go && go vet ./...; fi
scripts.test:go: if [ -d cli-go ]; then cd cli-go && go test ./...; fi
